description_long: This object is a traditional Japanese katana sword set, featuring two swords with curved, single-edged blades and ornate fittings. Both swords are housed in sleek, glossy purple scabbards with gold accents and red bands, resting in a custom-fitted, dark foam-lined display tray. The handles are wrapped in a matching purple material, with gold pommels and decorative fittings, providing both grip and visual appeal. The set includes a small, gold-colored tool or accessory, possibly for maintenance, placed alongside the swords. The tray is rectangular, dark brown, and designed to securely cradle the swords and accessories, preventing movement. The overall presentation is elegant and ceremonial, suitable for display or collection in an urban home, dojo, or specialty shop.
description: A ceremonial katana sword set with two purple-sheathed swords, gold accents, and a matching display tray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ends of the handles, gold pommels, and the accessory tool in the tray.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved purple scabbards, gold fittings, and the full length of the display tray.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tips of the scabbards and the accessory tool's position in the tray.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curvature of the swords and the arrangement within the tray.
attribute_handle_design: wrapped, straight handle with gold pommel and decorative fittings
